texto: Why did God want us to remember these painful stories? I could only think of one reason. Having faith is more than just believing; it's about living with fear and self-doubt and working through those feelings until they bring some sort of answer.-page 101, Chapter "Hajj
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Zarqa Nawaz que provoca enfrentar incertezas com ação. Ao questionar “Why did God want us to remember these painful stories? I could only think of one reason. Having f…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, faith, fear, com foco em trabalho e fear.
